nasb.text: “Therefore the desert creatures will live there along with the jackals; The ostriches also will live in it, And it will never again be inhabited Or dwelt in from generation to generation.

esv.text: “Therefore wild beasts shall dwell with hyenas in Babylon, and ostriches shall dwell in her. She shall never again have people, nor be inhabited for all generations.

cnv.text: 曠野的走獸和豺狼必住在那裡， 鴕鳥也必住在其中； 那地永遠再沒有人居住， 世世代代不再有人住在那裡，

ccb.text: “因此，巴比伦必杳无人烟，永远荒凉，成为豺狼等野兽出没之地、鸵鸟的栖身之所。
